note: Mock DoH/validating-resolver answers for DANE TLSA lookups (T-series). The `ad` field mirrors the resolver's Authenticated Data bit; per locked decision D6 an absent/false AD bit is treated as 'no TLSA' (fail-open to normal delivery), not as a verified record. Each case is keyed by the _<port>._tcp.<host> owner name the sender queries before a DANE-pinned connection.
